form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 305m at this track in a handy (17.73), beating Fernando Lee. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.07) when fifth over 305m at this track in a Other. Strong record off the draw with eight wins and four minors from 17 starts. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.75 lengths second over 300m Murray Bridge Straight in 17.17. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.83) in a Other, finishing a 1.5 lengths second. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Recorded a 6 length win (17.79) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Has two successes and three minors from 10 starts from box 8. Will need some luck to feature.
